text:
are often divided into “full duals” and “partial duals” based on the level of Medicaid 
benefits they receive. CMS generally considers beneficiaries to be full duals if they have values of 02, 
04, or 08, and to be partial duals if they have values of 01, 03, 05, or 06. Partial duals are sometimes 
divided into the QMB-only population (01) and all other partial duals (03, 05, or 06). There are 
different ways to classify dually eligible beneficiaries.
